stemHtml: Per Part-MED, what medical certificate class is required for CPL, MPL, and ATPL holders?

options.a: Class 2 for CPL; Class 1 for MPL and ATPL.
options.b: Class 1 for CPL and ATPL; Class 2 for MPL.
options.c: Class 1 for CPL, MPL, and ATPL.
options.d: Class 2 for CPL and MPL; Class 1 for ATPL.
